title: kiyo's pvp client
description: modpack designed to make your PvP experience just a little better :)
body:
![Kiyo's PvP Client](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a4cd7a9e61899a3a754d6bc72e74c53c5b8aa17.png)

Simple modpack designed to make your PvP experience just a little better, boasting great performance and plenty of PvP focused mods :D

I included what I consider to be "essential" to most users practicing or playing Minecraft PvP, for example;
- [Keystrokes](https://modrinth.com/mod/tiptapshow/versions) (like you'd see on a client such as Lunar or Feather)
- [CustomHud](https://modrinth.com/mod/customhud) (shows whether or not sprint is toggled, facing direction, coordinates, ping,  FPS, etc)
- [Reach Display](https://modrinth.com/mod/reach-display-(maintained)) (show how far away in blocks you hit a player from!)
- InventoryHud (shows your full inventory next to your hotbar!)
- [Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap/versions) with coordinate display
- [Essential](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential) for cosmetics and singleplayer inviting
- and more!

I also included some QoL stuff, notably resource packs, such as;
- [Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones)
- [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)
- Shorter Swords
- [Unique Dark](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/unique-dark)

Reminder these are all personal preference and can be disabled!

There are some very lightweight shaders included as well, however they are disabled by default

Tested on 1440p with 3x GUI scale, anything different may need adjustments to certain mods, like InventoryHud and TipTapShow (keystrokes mod)!

# Credits
- Based on [Remarkably Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/remarkably)
- Uses [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/) for better shield visibility
